narrative:
Union Twp. township has 5,700 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.3 percentage points.
